page_content:
Formerly: COMM498vV.

COMM458 Seminar in Political Communication (3 Credits) The examination of special topics for and theories of political communication.

Prerequisite: COMM250.

Repeatable to: 12 credits if content differs.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

COMM459 Special Topics in Science Communication (3 Credits)

This seminar course is designed to help students learn a variety of topics of science communication.

Repeatable to: 12 credits if content differs.

COMM460 Public Life in American Communities, 1634-1900 (3 Credits) Ways that Americans have used their voice to create public life. Focus is on the diverse social communities that have characterized American life and the place and characteristics of oral discourse in each.
